notes:
* When selecting the default "Play Arma 3 Tools" launch option, it should bring up the launcher with all the tools, but it just silently crashes instead.
* The other launch options work and you can successfully start these tools:
    * Addon Builder
    * Object Bulder
    * Publisher
    * Terrain Builder
* Terrain Builder throws an error about the `P:\` drive not being mounted. I've not built terrains for Arma 3 so I'm not sure if that's actually required or not.
* Not sure how to run the other tools (e.g. `CfgConvert`), but if I figure it out I'll post an update when time permits.
